form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 9th (Fr4) over 2030m at Newcastle, beaten 35 m by The Creek (2:29.60) in NR 51 to 58 on March 19 at $7. The run prior was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 1609m at Newcastle, beaten 12 m by Constantina (1:54.90) in NR up to 62 on March 13 at $31. Draws the pegs and should get his chance from there.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over race during the middle stages of the event.
Became unbalanced and galloped approaching the 1550m.
Worked forward to the lead near the 1100m then won comfortably.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 2160m after showing early pace at Narrabri, at the bell was 2nd-3.7 beaten 2 m by Otis Rising (2:41.90) in NR 45 to 55 on April 12 at $3.80. Two runs back posted a big 3.5 m win after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Narrabri (2:40.10) beating Terror Flying in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $2.90. Draws well and is likely to be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 1760m at Narrabri, at the bell was 5th-6.8 beaten 10 m by Annie Crocker (2:08.30) in NR up to 50 on April 12 at $21. Before that was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track was 9th-20.22 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Amillion Promises (1:58.00) in NR up to 58 on March 26 at $126. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr2) over 1609m after racing wide at this track was 4th-8.53 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Amillion Promises (1:58.00) in NR up to 58 on March 26 at $26. In the mix.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 2 m finishing third behind Mclean at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR up to 57 on March 4 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.75 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Bettine at Menangle over 1609m in a NR up to 57 on March 10 at $4.20. One of the primary contenders.

Can be in the finish with even luck.
